productDisplayName: Spinn Men Bostern Road White Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Bostern shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed sports shoe with an upraised heel and lace-up fastening and mesh inlaysWell padded collar and tongue (with branding)Foamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with a decoupled heel, flex grooves and patterned groovesOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the forefoot to act as a toe guardMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
